name: git-blame-blame-vscode
description: Who approved the line you are blaming?

commands.title: Git Blame Blame: Who Approved This Line?

gitBlameBlame.githubToken.markdownDescription: GitHub token used by the Git Blame Blame extension. Falls back to the `GITHUB_TOKEN` environment variable.

gitBlameBlame.cliPath.markdownDescription: Optional path to the `git-blame-blame` CLI. Defaults to the repository build output or `git-blame-blame` on your PATH.
